commit 26b6ab23b780437f91aac5c57af7feff589a673e
Author: antoniopresto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Dec 10 01:46:51 2025 -0300

    feat(SPMAIS-31425): add invoice cashback permission check
    
    - Create invoiceCashbackPermission service layer (api, repository, services, store, hooks)
    - Modify useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints to check permission before navigation
    - Skip onboarding screen if user has already redeemed cashback
    - Save permission after first successful rescue in InvoiceCashbackSummary
    - Fix: make participantId optional in RescuePayload (saga fills automatically)
    - Add zustand dependency for new state management
